Welcome to the Forum Archive!

Years of conversation fill a ton of digital pages, and we've kept all of it accessible to browse or copy over. Whether you're looking for reveal articles for older champions, or the first time that Rammus rolled into an "OK" thread, or anything in between, you can find it here. When you're finished, check out the boards to join in the latest League of Legends discussions.

GO TO BOARDS

Week 4 Release Notes

123

Pendragon

Director of Player Experience

07-02-2009

Master Yi

  • Meditate Mana Cost changed from 120/140/160/180/200 to 100/120/140/160/180, and heal amount changed from 2/4/6/8/10% of Max Health per second to 50/100/150/200/250 Health per second
  • Alpha Strike Cooldown changed from 150/120/90 to 90/90/90, and damage changed from 300% of Attack Damage, to 200/300/400 + 100% of Attack Damage

Tristana
  • Basic Attack range increased to 500 from 350

Ryze
  • Spell Flux Damage changed from 260/340/420 to 300/400/500
  • Rune Prizon Cast Range changed from 625 to 600 and damage increased to 80 per second from 75 per second

Annie
  • Molten Shield Ability Power Ratio increased to 0.2 from 0.15, and Damage to Attacker changed from 10/20/30/40/50 to 20/30/40/50/60

Sivir
  • On the Hunt movement speed decreased to 35% from 40%, and attack speed increased to 30/55/80% from 25/50/75%
  • Spell Shield cooldown decreased to 30/25/20/15/10 from 44/38/30/22/14
  • Ricochet Projectile Speed increased to 1000 from 900, and Bounce Radius increased to 500 from 400

Teemo
  • Toxic Shot Damage changed from 2/4/6/8/10 per debuff stack, to 8/16/24/32/40 damage, and no longer stacks
  • Scout's Bounty Armor Reduction changed from 20/40/60 to 30/45/60, and bonus gold increased to 100/150/200 from 50/100/150
  • Basic Attack Damage increased to 41 from 39
  • Blinding Dart Miss Chance increase to 10/20/30/40/50% from 14/22/30/38/44%

Soraka
  • Astral Blessing Mana Cost increased to 60/90/120/150/180 from 60/80/100/120/140, Resistance Bonus removed, and heal changed to 10/18/26/34/42 health per 2 seconds for 16 seconds

Fiddlesticks
  • Drain Mana Cost increased to 100/120/140/160/180 from 90/105/120/135/150, and drain amount changed to 25/50/75/100/125 from 30/50/70/90/110 per second
  • Dark Wind Ability Power Ratio increased to 0.25 from 0.2, and Damage Dealth to each target decreased to 80 from 100
  • Crowstorm damage per second increased to 120/200/280 from 120/180/240

Bowmaster
  • Archer's Mark has been removed and replaced with Accumulate Wealth, (grants 2/4/6/8/10 bonus gold whenever Ashe kills a unit)
  • Focus (Passive) now charges for a max of 5, instead of 3
  • Enchanted Crystal Arror cooldown increased to 75 from 65


Summoner Spells & Mastery
  • Flash Cooldown increased to 3.5 minutes from 2.5 minutes
  • Teleport Cooldown
  • increased to 3 minutes from 2 miunutes
  • Spacial Accuracy talent cast time reduction decreased to 0.5 from 1
  • Plentiful Bounty talent bonus gold from Smite decreased to 5 from 10
  • Boost coodlwon decreased to 6 minutes from 8 minutes
  • Heal cooldown increased to 5 minutes from 4.5 minutes
  • Menter's Faith talent increases Heal ability by 75 instead of 100
  • Ghost cooldown reduced to 2 minutes from 6 minutes, and movement speed increased to 20% from 10%
  • Revive cooldown reduced to 5 minutes from 8 minutes
  • Preservation talent duration of Health Bonus increased to 2 minutes from 90 seconds
  • Clairvoyance cooldown decreased to 90 seconds from 2 minutes, and sight range increased to 1800 from 1500
  • Exhaust cooldown decreased to 4 minutes from 5 minutes
  • Fortify cooldown increased to 6 minutes from 5 minutes




Item Changes
  • Black Cleaver Recipe Cost increased to 800 from 600
  • Frozen Hearth Recipe Cost increased from 1000 to 800
  • Avarice Blade Recipe Cost increased to 320 from 250
  • Infinity edge Recipe Cost increased to 600 from 200
  • Cloak of Agility Critial Strike bonus increased to 18% from 10%
  • Rod of Agres now caps after 3 bonuses
  • Mejai's Soulstealer no longer builds Zhonya's Ring of the Mindreamer, Recipe Cost increased to 600 from 400, and bonus Ability Power per kill increased to 10 from 5
  • Zhonya's Ring of the Mindreaver now takes Sage's Ring instead of Mejai's Soulstealer, recipe cost increased to 900 from 600, and stats changed to +550 mana, +100 ability power, and 20% increased magic damage
  • Passion's Embrace has been renamed to Philosopher's Stone
  • Sheen now has a 100% chance on spell cast to cause your next attack to deal 100% extra damage, (increased from 50%)

Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a Bug where Master Yi's Alpha Strike was doing too much damage and could crit
  • Fixed a Bug where Pyromania's Stun was too long if you proc'd it with Disintegrate
  • Fixed a Bug where Frost Shots slow off Volley would last too long
  • Fixed Bug where the wrong icons were being used in game for summoner spells
  • Fixed a Bug where Bag of Tea was showing the wrong Spell Particle Effect
  • Fixed a Bug where Damage Over Time spells did not consistant deal the right amount of ticks
  • Fixed a Bug with the Particle effect of Fiddlesticks Terrify
  • Fixed a Bug where Pickaxe did not properly show what it built into in the Shop
  • Fixed a Bug where Recurve Bow did not properly show what it built into in the Shop
  • Fixed a Bug that caused Avarice Blade to generate Too Much Gold

Tooltips
  • Minotaur's Headbutt - Fixed Tooltip to explain that Headbutt deals Magical Damage
  • Minotaur's Ferocious Howl - Fixed Tooltip to explain that the health increase given is temporary. Renamed Ferocious Howl to Unbreakable Will"
  • Summoner Rally - Fixed Tooltip to Reflect correct Functionality
  • Summoner Revive - Fixed a Tooltip Error
  • Tristana's Rending Shot - Fixed Tooltip that was not properly showing the spell slows Targets by 10/15/20/25/30%
  • Ryze's Overload - Fixed a Tooltip Error


Miscellaneous
  • Tuned all recommend items in shops
  • Fountain healing increased to 6.5% from 5%
  • Base Inhibitor's Health increased to 6000 from 5000
  • Melee Minions Gold bounty increased to 26 from 22
  • Range Minions Gold Bounty decreased to 18 from 22
  • Neutral Minion Gold Bounty increased by 50-125%
  • Cast time on teleport-home (Hotkey-7) increased to 8 seconds from 4 seconds
  • Minions now spawn after 1 minute, instead of 1 minute and 40 seconds
  • Minions now spawn from the Nexus, instead of Inhibitors
  • Epic Worm encounter tuned
  • Middle Land Turret Health increased to 4500 from 4000
  • Fixed A Bug where the Screen would randomly jump to another Champion
  • A message is now displayed when a player disconnects
  • Fixed some Vista compatibility issues
  • Changed the side of HUD to take up a smaller percentage of the screen on higher resolutions

-28
